description.en: Return a dictionary mapping module-level class names to class descriptors. If possible, descriptors for imported base classes are included. Parameter module is a string with the name of the module to read; it may be the name of a module within a package. If given, path is a sequence of directory paths prepended to sys.path, which is used to locate the module source code. This function is the original interface and is only kept for back compatibility. It returns a filtered version of the follo...

description.en: Return a dictionary-based tree containing a function or class descriptors for each function and class defined in the module with a def or class statement. The returned dictionary maps module-level function and class names to their descriptors. Nested objects are entered into the children dictionary of their parent. As with readmodule, module names the module to be read and path is prepended to sys.path. If the module being read is a package, the returned dictionary has a key '__path__' whose ...
